heading: Definitions
label: 1971 Definitions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 4231 of this titlePub. L. 119–65

children.heading: Prize competition
children.label: 1 Prize competition
children.text: The term “prize competition” means the competition for the award of the Genius Prize for Save Our Seas Innovations established under .section 1972 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Commerce.
